creator: cain@ecircles.com

59 /usr/ports/misc/rpm#	make
===>  Building for rpm-2.5.5
for d in popt misc lib build tools ; do \
	(cd $d; gmake) \
	  || case "" in *k*) fail=yes;; *) exit 1;; esac;\
done && test -z "$fail"
